description: Fetch and parse the full Hugging Science catalog (llms-full.txt) — every entry across all domains — into markdown or JSON, optionally filtered.
rules: read-only — HTTPS GET against huggingscience.co, no mutation
RAW optional: any non-empty value prints the untouched file (--raw)
usage: No required vars. Optional: RAW, FILTER, TAG, FORMAT. Output: catalog.out.
limitation: Needs network to reach huggingscience.co; offline the porter records the failure and emits a non-empty file. The full catalog is large — prefer `topic` or `search` when you know the domain/keyword.
